title: Fabulous Ores
description: A mod that adds more ores to cave generation and expands on the vanilla ores.
body: # MOD STILL IN DEVELOPMENT MORE CONTENT WILL BE ADDED Bored of the vanilla ores ? Look no further ! This mod adds new ores and enhances the old ones !   ### For now it adds **5 new ores** :   #### Lead : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_50b91c77-45ef-413b-8f00-7287b3a76cc0.png) A little weaker then iron but the weight makes you more resistent to knockback   #### Silver : ![Silver Items and blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71486309374c3f19eba83c5c1c92337aef58d1e6_0.webp) Fast tools perfect for fighting undead mobs in early game #### Platinum : ![Platinum Items and Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5f71e3924b08033e80f28e954ff8222956d7207.png) Better version of gold, this ore is very fast and strong but breaks easily #### Pyrite : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_025db8fd-a0c3-49e0-94b1-e368c8e5c5c5.png) A middle Ground between iron and diamond. Very usefull if you dont want to spend early game diamonds. #### Sulfur : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_60d2caec-128f-4e0c-a847-38102b2870ef.png) Only useful to make large amounts of gunpowder with a little dried kelp and charcoal   #### And the Vanilla ores have more block variation for building. Gold : Bars Copper : Bars   #### Planned features :  Tin Jade Palladium More uses for the current added ores Copper Tool and armor sets with an unique oxydation feature More shields More Vanilla ores building blocks
